name: gringotts-budget-vault-tests
description: Parser, Playwright, accessibility, visual-contract, Lighthouse, and local-first security tests for Gringotts Budget Vault

scripts.test:preflight: npm run test:parser && playwright test tests/boot-navigation.spec.js tests/bank-export-import.spec.js tests/import-profiles.spec.js tests/profile-portability.spec.js tests/profile-versioning-diagnostics.spec.js tests/import-receipt-audit-roadmap.spec.js tests/v116-ui-architecture.spec.js tests/repository-security.spec.js --project=chromium
